mapper.select:
SELECT oc.id, oc.order_id, oc.user_id, oc.taste_score, oc.packaging_score, oc.delivery_score, oc.tags, oc.content, oc.images, oc.like_count, oc.create_time, oc.parent_id, oc.comment_type, oc.reply_to_user_id FROM order_comment oc WHERE oc.parent_id IS NULL
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, oc.tags)
ORDER BY oc.create_time DESC
mapper.delete:
delete from order_comment where id in
#{id}
